calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Appointing Private Fiduciary David Levin As Trustee To Serve Without Bond
Off Calendar Sep-16-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth Hansen for The Portland Youth Philharmonic (Petitioner).

The Court noted that the proposed order says to appoint without continuing Court supervision, but the trust is not under Court supervision. Ms. Hansen stated that the Private Fiduciary requested to have that language in the order so that there would be no confusion, that the trust waives bond for anyone named, that everyone has signed waivers and that the waivers were filed on August 1st. Ms. Hansen also stated that the Decedent's final taxes need to be filed, that there are some creditors, that they don't need to send notice to the Department of Healthcare Services, that they can set out distribution, and that half goes to her Client and half goes to a couple in India. In addition, Ms. Hansen stated that creditors' claims would be less than the amount of assets that are in the trust, that the claims are about $30,000.00 to $40,000.00, that she helped with the Decedent's taxes last year and that she thinks the medical expenses will eliminate all the taxes. The Petition for Order Appointing Private Fiduciary David Levin as Trustee to Serve without Bond is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
